### REQUEST ###
```
POST https://api2.cursor.sh:443/aiserver.v1.RepositoryService/FastUpdateFileV2 HTTP/1.1

Authorization: Bearer REDACTED
Connect-Protocol-Version: 1
Connect-Timeout-Ms: 180000
Connection: close
Content-Encoding: gzip
Content-Type: application/proto
Host: api2.cursor.sh
Traceparent: REDACTED

X-Amzn-Trace-Id: REDACTED

X-Cursor-Client-Type: ide
X-Cursor-Client-Version: 2.6.11
X-Cursor-Config-Version: REDACTED
```

```
{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4842195278606858022
  },
  "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "6:VARINT": 4,
  "7:LEN": [
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": " from __future__ import annotations\r\n \r\n import asyncio\r\n import logging\r\n import signal\r\n import traceback\r\n from contextlib import asynccontextmanager\r\n from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone\r\n \r\nfrom prometheus_client import start_http_server\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n \r\nfrom .backoff import compute_backoff_seconds\r\nfrom .broker import (\r\n    BrokerMessage,\r\n    ack_job,\r\n    ensure_group,\r\n    enqueue_job,\r\n    push_dead_letter,\r\n    read_jobs,\r\n    reclaim_stuck,\r\n    update_queue_depth,\r\n)\r\nfrom .config import get_settings\r\nfrom .db import get_session_factory, init_db\r\nfrom .logging import configure_logging, get_logger\r\nfrom .metrics import JOB_DURATION_SECONDS, JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL, JOBS_STARTED_TOTAL\r\nfrom .models import Job, JobState\r\nfrom .state_machine import InvalidStateTransition, transition_state\r\nfrom .tasks import get_task_definition, make_context\r\n \r\n \r\n class JobCanceled(Exception):\r\n     pass\r\n \r\n \r\n logger = get_logger(__name__, service=\"worker\")\r\n \r\n \r\n @asynccontextmanager\r\n async def _session_scope() -> AsyncSession:\r\n     factory = get_session_factory()\r\n     async with factory() as session:\r\n         async with session.begin():\r\n             yield session\r\n \r\n \r\n async def _check_canceled(job_id: str) -> None:\r\n     factory = get_session_factory()\r\n     async with factory() as session:\r\n         job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n         if job and job.cancel_requested:\r\n             raise JobCanceled(f\"Job {job_id} canceled\")\r\n \r\n \r\nasync def _process_message(msg: BrokerMessage, *, queue: str, consumer_name: str) -> None:\r\n    fields = msg.fields\r\n    job_id = fields.get(\"job_id\")\r\n    if not job_id:\r\n        logger.error(\"Missing job_id in message\", extra={\"stream_id\": msg.entry_id})\r\n        await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n        return\r\n\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n\r\n    # Phase 1: transition QUEUED -> RUNNING and increment attempts\r\n    async with _session_scope() as session:\r\n        job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n        if job is None:\r\n            logger.warning(\"Job not found; acking\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        if job.state in {JobState.SUCCEEDED, JobState.CANCELED, JobState.DEAD}:\r\n            logger.info(\r\n                \"Job already in terminal state; acking\",\r\n                extra={\"job_id\": job_id, \"state\": job.state.value},\r\n            )\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        # Idempotency: if job has already succeeded, do not re-run side effects.\r\n        if job.idempotency_key and job.state == JobState.SUCCEEDED:\r\n            logger.info(\"Idempotent re-delivery; acking\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        # Only process QUEUED jobs here. If state changed unexpectedly, ack.\r\n        if job.state != JobState.QUEUED:\r\n            logger.info(\r\n                \"Job not QUEUED; skipping\",\r\n                extra={\"job_id\": job_id, \"state\": job.state.value},\r\n            )\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        attempt = job.attempts + 1\r\n        job.attempts = attempt\r\n        try:\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.RUNNING, \"Worker starting execution\")\r\n        except InvalidStateTransition:\r\n            logger.exception(\"Invalid state transition to RUNNING\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n    # Phase 2: execute task outside transaction\r\n    job_type = fields.get(\"type\") or (job.type if \"job\" in locals() else \"unknown\")  # type: ignore[name-defined]\r\n    task_def = get_task_definition(job_type)\r\n\r\n    import time\r\n\r\n    start = time.monotonic()\r\n    JOBS_STARTED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type).inc()\r\n\r\n    async def check_canceled() -> None:\r\n        await _check_canceled(job_id)\r\n\r\n    # Reload job state for the context\r\n    factory = get_session_factory()\r\n    async with factory() as exec_session:\r\n        job_for_ctx = await exec_session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n\r\n    ctx_logger = get_logger(f\"miniqueue.task.{task_def.name}\", service=\"worker\")\r\n    ctx = make_context(\r\n        job=job_for_ctx,  # type: ignore[arg-type]\r\n        attempt=attempt,\r\n        session=None,\r\n        logger=ctx_logger,\r\n        check_canceled=check_canceled,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    try:\r\n        payload = task_def.payload_model.model_validate(job_for_ctx.payload)  # type: ignore[arg-type]\r\n        result = await task_def.func(ctx, payload)\r\n        exc: BaseException | None = None\r\n        canceled = False\r\n    except JobCanceled:\r\n        result = None\r\n        exc = None\r\n        canceled = True\r\n    except BaseException as e:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n        result = None\r\n        exc = e\r\n        canceled = False\r\n\r\n    duration = time.monotonic() - start\r\n    JOB_DURATION_SECONDS.labels(type=job_type).observe(duration)\r\n\r\n    # Phase 3: final state transition + result persistence\r\n    async with _session_scope() as session:\r\n        job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n        if job is None:\r\n            logger.error(\"Job disappeared before completion\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        if canceled:\r\n            job.result = None\r\n            job.last_error = \"Canceled\"\r\n            job.cancel_requested = False\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.CANCELED, \"Job canceled cooperatively\")\r\n            JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, state=JobState.CANCELED.value).inc()\r\n        elif exc is None:\r\n            job.result = result  # type: ignore[assignment]\r\n            job.last_error = None\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.SUCCEEDED, \"Job succeeded\")\r\n            JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, state=JobState.SUCCEEDED.value).inc()\r\n        else:\r\n            # Failure path: decide between retry and DEAD\r\n            job.last_error = \"\".join(\r\n                traceback.format_exception_only(type(exc), exc)  # type: ignore[arg-type]\r\n            ).strip()\r\n\r\n            if job.attempts >= job.max_attempts:\r\n                await transition_state(session, job, JobState.DEAD, \"Job reached max attempts\")\r\n                await push_dead_letter(\r\n                    {\r\n                        \"job_id\": job.id,\r\n                        \"type\": job.type,\r\n                        \"queue\": job.queue,\r\n                        \"error\": job.last_error or \"\",\r\n                    }\r\n                )\r\n                JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, state=JobState.DEAD.value).inc()\r\n            else:\r\n                delay = compute_backoff_seconds(\r\n                    job.attempts,\r\n                    base=settings.backoff_base_seconds,\r\n                    multiplier=settings.backoff_multiplier,\r\n                    cap=settings.backoff_cap_seconds,\r\n                )\r\n                job.next_run_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(seconds=delay)\r\n                job.is_enqueued = False\r\n                await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Job scheduled for retry\")\r\n\r\n    # Only XACK after DB commit succeeded.\r\n    await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n \r\n \r\n async def worker_loop(index: int, *, queue: str, consumer_name: str) -> None:\r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     while True:\r\n         messages = await read_jobs(\r\n             queue=queue,\r\n             consumer_name=consumer_name,\r\n             count=1,\r\n             block_ms=5_000,\r\n         )\r\n         if not messages:\r\n             continue\r\n         for msg in messages:\r\n             try:\r\n                 await _process_message(msg, queue=queue, consumer_name=consumer_name)\r\n             except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n                 logger.exception(\"Unhandled error in worker loop\", extra={\"consumer\": consumer_name})\r\n \r\n \r\nasync def reclaim_loop(*, queue: str, consumer_name: str) -> None:\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n    while True:\r\n        await asyncio.sleep(settings.reclaim_interval_sec)\r\n        try:\r\n            messages = await reclaim_stuck(\r\n                queue=queue,\r\n                consumer_name=consumer_name,\r\n                min_idle_ms=settings.visibility_timeout_ms,\r\n            )\r\n            for msg in messages:\r\n                try:\r\n                    await _process_message(msg, queue=queue, consumer_name=consumer_name)\r\n                except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n                    logger.exception(\r\n                        \"Unhandled error processing reclaimed message\",\r\n                        extra={\"consumer\": consumer_name},\r\n                    )\r\n            await update_queue_depth(queue)\r\n        except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n            logger.exception(\"Error in reclaim loop\", extra={\"consumer\": consumer_name})\r\n \r\n \r\n async def main() -> None:\r\n     configure_logging(service=\"worker\")\r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n \r\n     # Start Prometheus metrics server for this process.\r\n     start_http_server(settings.metrics_port)\r\n \r\n     await init_db()\r\n     await ensure_group(settings.queue_default)\r\n \r\n     queue = settings.queue_default\r\n     consumer_name = f\"worker-{id(asyncio.current_task())}\"\r\n \r\n     tasks = [\r\n         asyncio.create_task(worker_loop(i, queue=queue, consumer_name=consumer_name))\r\n         for i in range(settings.worker_concurrency)\r\n     ]\r\n     tasks.append(asyncio.create_task(reclaim_loop(queue=queue, consumer_name=consumer_name)))\r\n \r\n     stop_event = asyncio.Event()\r\n \r\n     loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()\r\n \r\n     for sig in (signal.SIGINT, signal.SIGTERM):\r\n         loop.add_signal_handler(sig, stop_event.set)\r\n \r\n     await stop_event.wait()\r\n     for t in tasks:\r\n         t.cancel()\r\n     await asyncio.gather(*tasks, return_exceptions=True)\r\n \r\n \r\n if __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n     asyncio.run(main())\r\n \r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "8a917fb4ded0c661a9ed60fe6bebfd9e944ad9f22365cb42487b92ab48f9c07b",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },

          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },

          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],

    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": " from __future__ import annotations\r\n \r\n import enum\r\n import uuid\r\n from datetime import datetime\r\n from typing import Any, Dict, Optional\r\n \r\nfrom sqlalchemy import JSON, Boolean, DateTime, Enum, ForeignKey, Integer, String, Text, UniqueConstraint\r\n from sqlalchemy.orm import DeclarativeBase, Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\r\n \r\n \r\n class Base(DeclarativeBase):  # type: ignore[misc]\r\n     pass\r\n \r\n \r\n class JobState(str, enum.Enum):\r\n     QUEUED = \"QUEUED\"\r\n     RUNNING = \"RUNNING\"\r\n     SUCCEEDED = \"SUCCEEDED\"\r\n     FAILED = \"FAILED\"\r\n     CANCELED = \"CANCELED\"\r\n     DEAD = \"DEAD\"\r\n \r\n \r\n class Job(Base):\r\n     __tablename__ = \"jobs\"\r\n \r\n     id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\r\n         String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4())\r\n     )\r\n     type: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(64), nullable=False)\r\n     queue: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(64), default=\"default\")\r\n \r\n     payload: Mapped[Dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=False)\r\n \r\n     state: Mapped[JobState] = mapped_column(\r\n         Enum(JobState), default=JobState.QUEUED, nullable=False\r\n     )\r\n \r\n     created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\r\n         DateTime(timezone=True), default=datetime.utcnow, nullable=False\r\n     )\r\n     updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\r\n         DateTime(timezone=True), default=datetime.utcnow, nullable=False\r\n     )\r\n \r\n     idempotency_key: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(128), nullable=True)\r\n \r\n     attempts: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=0, nullable=False)\r\n     max_attempts: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=3, nullable=False)\r\n \r\n     next_run_at: Mapped[Optional[datetime]] = mapped_column(\r\n         DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=True\r\n     )\r\n \r\n     schedule: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(128), nullable=True)\r\n \r\n     last_error: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)\r\n \r\n     result: Mapped[Optional[Dict[str, Any]]] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=True)\r\n \r\n     is_enqueued: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, default=False, nullable=False)\r\n     cancel_requested: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, default=False, nullable=False)\r\n \r\n     events: Mapped[list[\"JobEvent\"]] = relationship(\r\n         back_populates=\"job\", cascade=\"all, delete-orphan\"\r\n     )\r\n \r\n \r\n class JobEvent(Base):\r\n     __tablename__ = \"job_events\"\r\n \r\n     id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)\r\n \r\n     job_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\r\n         String(36), ForeignKey(\"jobs.id\", ondelete=\"CASCADE\"), nullable=False\r\n     )\r\n \r\n     ts: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\r\n         DateTime(timezone=True), default=datetime.utcnow, nullable=False\r\n     )\r\n \r\n     old_state: Mapped[Optional[JobState]] = mapped_column(Enum(JobState), nullable=True)\r\n     new_state: Mapped[JobState] = mapped_column(Enum(JobState), nullable=False)\r\n \r\n     message: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=False)\r\n \r\n     metadata: Mapped[Dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON, default=dict, nullable=False)\r\n \r\n     job: Mapped[Job] = relationship(back_populates=\"events\")\r\n \r\n \r\n class ScheduleTick(Base):\r\n     __tablename__ = \"schedule_ticks\"\r\n \r\n     id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)\r\n \r\n     schedule_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(128), nullable=False)\r\n     planned_time: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=False)\r\n     enqueued_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\r\n         DateTime(timezone=True), default=datetime.utcnow, nullable=False\r\n     )\r\n \r\n     __table_args__ = (\r\n         UniqueConstraint(\"schedule_id\", \"planned_time\", name=\"uq_schedule_tick\"),\r\n     )\r\n \r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "46ee3f151dc5da83ff230c574cd5f9264ae62b1c54fd2df7926308eca0c05758",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"

    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": " from __future__ import annotations\r\n \r\n import logging\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\r\nfrom typing import Any, Awaitable, Callable, Dict, MutableMapping, Optional, Type\r\n \r\n from pydantic import BaseModel\r\n from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n \r\n from ..config import Settings, get_settings\r\n from ..models import Job\r\n \r\n \r\n TaskFunc = Callable[[\"TaskContext\", BaseModel], Awaitable[Any]]\r\n \r\n \r\n @dataclass\r\n class TaskDefinition:\r\n     name: str\r\n     payload_model: Type[BaseModel]\r\n     func: TaskFunc\r\n     max_attempts_default: int\r\n \r\n \r\n @dataclass\r\n class TaskContext:\r\n     job: Job\r\n     attempt: int\r\n    session: Optional[AsyncSession]\r\n     settings: Settings\r\n     logger: logging.Logger\r\n     check_canceled: Callable[[], Awaitable[None]]\r\n \r\n \r\n _TASKS: MutableMapping[str, TaskDefinition] = {}\r\n \r\n \r\n def register_task(\r\n     name: str,\r\n     *,\r\n     payload_model: Type[BaseModel],\r\n     max_attempts_default: int = 3,\r\n ) -> Callable[[TaskFunc], TaskFunc]:\r\n     \"\"\"Decorator to register a task implementation.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     def decorator(func: TaskFunc) -> TaskFunc:\r\n         if name in _TASKS:\r\n             raise ValueError(f\"Task {name!r} already registered\")\r\n         _TASKS[name] = TaskDefinition(\r\n             name=name,\r\n             payload_model=payload_model,\r\n             func=func,\r\n             max_attempts_default=max_attempts_default,\r\n         )\r\n         return func\r\n \r\n     return decorator\r\n \r\n \r\n def get_task_definition(name: str) -> TaskDefinition:\r\n     try:\r\n         return _TASKS[name]\r\n     except KeyError as exc:\r\n         raise KeyError(f\"Unknown task type {name!r}\") from exc\r\n \r\n \r\n def make_context(\r\n     *,\r\n     job: Job,\r\n     attempt: int,\r\n    session: Optional[AsyncSession],\r\n     logger: logging.Logger,\r\n     check_canceled: Callable[[], Awaitable[None]],\r\n ) -> TaskContext:\r\n     return TaskContext(\r\n         job=job,\r\n         attempt=attempt,\r\n         session=session,\r\n         settings=get_settings(),\r\n         logger=logger,\r\n         check_canceled=check_canceled,\r\n     )\r\n \r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "abfb6debdb29f8ce5a091fe21d2234bc2376f780abf28502e757aa086b2bad21",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": " from __future__ import annotations\r\n \r\n import asyncio\r\n import signal\r\n from dataclasses import dataclass\r\n from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone\r\n from pathlib import Path\r\n from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional\r\n \r\n import yaml\r\n from prometheus_client import start_http_server\r\n from sqlalchemy import and_, select\r\n from sqlalchemy.exc import IntegrityError\r\n from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n \r\n from .broker import enqueue_job, update_queue_depth\r\n from .config import get_settings\r\n from .db import get_session_factory, init_db\r\n from .logging import configure_logging, get_logger\r\n from .metrics import SCHEDULER_ENQUEUES_TOTAL\r\n from .models import Job, JobState, ScheduleTick\r\n from .state_machine import transition_state\r\n \r\n \r\n logger = get_logger(__name__, service=\"scheduler\")\r\n \r\n \r\n @dataclass\r\n class RecurringSchedule:\r\n     id: str\r\n     job_type: str\r\n     queue: str\r\n     interval_seconds: int\r\n     max_attempts: int\r\n     payload: Dict[str, Any]\r\n \r\n \r\n def load_schedules(path: Path) -> List[RecurringSchedule]:\r\n     if not path.exists():\r\n         return []\r\n     raw = yaml.safe_load(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")) or {}\r\n     out: List[RecurringSchedule] = []\r\n     for item in raw.get(\"schedules\", []):\r\n         out.append(\r\n             RecurringSchedule(\r\n                 id=str(item[\"id\"]),\r\n                 job_type=str(item[\"job_type\"]),\r\n                 queue=str(item.get(\"queue\", \"default\")),\r\n                 interval_seconds=int(item.get(\"interval_seconds\", 60)),\r\n                 max_attempts=int(item.get(\"max_attempts\", 3)),\r\n                 payload=dict(item.get(\"payload\", {})),\r\n             )\r\n         )\r\n     return out\r\n \r\n \r\n async def _enqueue_due_jobs(session: AsyncSession, now: datetime) -> None:\r\n     \"\"\"Enqueue delayed/retry jobs whose next_run_at is due.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     stmt = (\r\n         select(Job)\r\n         .where(\r\n             and_(\r\n                 Job.state == JobState.QUEUED,\r\n                 Job.is_enqueued.is_(False),\r\n                 Job.next_run_at.is_not(None),\r\n                 Job.next_run_at <= now,\r\n             )\r\n         )\r\n         .with_for_update(skip_locked=True)\r\n     )\r\n     result = await session.execute(stmt)\r\n     jobs: List[Job] = list(result.scalars())\r\n     for job in jobs:\r\n         await enqueue_job(\r\n             job_id=job.id,\r\n             job_type=job.type,\r\n             queue=job.queue,\r\n             idempotency_key=job.idempotency_key,\r\n         )\r\n         job.is_enqueued = True\r\n         job.next_run_at = None\r\n         await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Scheduler enqueued delayed job\")\r\n         SCHEDULER_ENQUEUES_TOTAL.labels(schedule_id=\"delayed\").inc()\r\n \r\n \r\n async def _enqueue_recurring(\r\n     session: AsyncSession,\r\n     schedules: List[RecurringSchedule],\r\n     now: datetime,\r\n ) -> None:\r\n     \"\"\"Enqueue recurring jobs based on config file schedules.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     for sched in schedules:\r\n         # Compute the current tick's planned_time by flooring now to interval.\r\n         seconds = int(now.timestamp())\r\n         tick_start = seconds - (seconds % sched.interval_seconds)\r\n         planned = datetime.fromtimestamp(tick_start, tz=timezone.utc)\r\n \r\n         # Check if this tick already exists.\r\n         stmt = select(ScheduleTick).where(\r\n             and_(\r\n                 ScheduleTick.schedule_id == sched.id,\r\n                 ScheduleTick.planned_time == planned,\r\n             )\r\n         )\r\n         exists = (await session.execute(stmt)).scalar_one_or_none()\r\n         if exists:\r\n             continue\r\n \r\n         tick = ScheduleTick(schedule_id=sched.id, planned_time=planned)\r\n         session.add(tick)\r\n         await session.flush()\r\n \r\n         # Create a new job row for this schedule.\r\n         job = Job(\r\n             type=sched.job_type,\r\n             queue=sched.queue,\r\n             payload=sched.payload,\r\n             max_attempts=sched.max_attempts,\r\n             state=JobState.QUEUED,\r\n             is_enqueued=False,\r\n             next_run_at=now,\r\n             schedule=sched.id,\r\n             idempotency_key=f\"{sched.id}:{planned.isoformat()}\",\r\n         )\r\n         session.add(job)\r\n         await session.flush()\r\n \r\n         await enqueue_job(\r\n             job_id=job.id,\r\n             job_type=job.type,\r\n             queue=job.queue,\r\n             idempotency_key=job.idempotency_key,\r\n         )\r\n         job.is_enqueued = True\r\n         await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Scheduler enqueued recurring job\")\r\n         SCHEDULER_ENQUEUES_TOTAL.labels(schedule_id=sched.id).inc()\r\n \r\n \r\n async def scheduler_loop(schedules: List[RecurringSchedule]) -> None:\r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     factory = get_session_factory()\r\n     queue = settings.queue_default\r\n \r\n     while True:\r\n         now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)\r\n         async with factory() as session:\r\n             async with session.begin():\r\n                 await _enqueue_due_jobs(session, now)\r\n                 await _enqueue_recurring(session, schedules, now)\r\n         try:\r\n             await update_queue_depth(queue)\r\n         except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n             logger.exception(\"Failed to update queue depth\")\r\n         await asyncio.sleep(settings.scheduler_interval_sec)\r\n \r\n \r\n async def main() -> None:\r\n     configure_logging(service=\"scheduler\")\r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n \r\n     # Prometheus metrics server for scheduler.\r\n     start_http_server(settings.metrics_port)\r\n \r\n     await init_db()\r\n \r\n     config_path = Path(\"config\") / \"schedules.yml\"\r\n     schedules = load_schedules(config_path)\r\n     logger.info(\"Loaded schedules\", extra={\"count\": len(schedules)})\r\n \r\n     stop_event = asyncio.Event()\r\n \r\n     loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()\r\n     for sig in (signal.SIGINT, signal.SIGTERM):\r\n         loop.add_signal_handler(sig, stop_event.set)\r\n \r\n     task = asyncio.create_task(scheduler_loop(schedules))\r\n \r\n     await stop_event.wait()\r\n     task.cancel()\r\n     await asyncio.gather(task, return_exceptions=True)\r\n \r\n \r\n if __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n     asyncio.run(main())\r\n \r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "7432de4d8d99559fecfbff96c8322503a562487ef2cca7951887fc59f5b1e3b7",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}
```

### RESPONSE ###
```
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true
Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Grpc-Status\, Grpc-Message\, Grpc-Status-Details-Bin\, Content-Encoding\, Connect-Content-Encoding\, traceparent\, backend-traceparent\, x-amzn-trace-id\, x-request-id
Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Thu\, 05 Mar 2026 02:53:22 GMT
Vary: Origin
```

```
{
  "1:VARINT": 1
}
```

### SIGNATURE ###
```
http:host is localhost
http:method is POST
http:queryparams is -NONE-
http:requestBodyJSON is {"1:LEN": {"1:I64": 4842195278606858022}, "2:LEN": "REDACTED", "6:VARINT": 4, "7:LEN": [{"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": " from __future__ import annotations\r\n \r\n import asyncio\r\n import logging\r\n import signal\r\n import traceback\r\n from contextlib import asynccontextmanager\r\n from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone\r\n \r\nfrom prometheus_client import start_http_server\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n \r\nfrom .backoff import compute_backoff_seconds\r\nfrom .broker import (\r\n    BrokerMessage,\r\n    ack_job,\r\n    ensure_group,\r\n    enqueue_job,\r\n    push_dead_letter,\r\n    read_jobs,\r\n    reclaim_stuck,\r\n    update_queue_depth,\r\n)\r\nfrom .config import get_settings\r\nfrom .db import get_session_factory, init_db\r\nfrom .logging import configure_logging, get_logger\r\nfrom .metrics import JOB_DURATION_SECONDS, JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL, JOBS_STARTED_TOTAL\r\nfrom .models import Job, JobState\r\nfrom .state_machine import InvalidStateTransition, transition_state\r\nfrom .tasks import get_task_definition, make_context\r\n \r\n \r\n class JobCanceled(Exception):\r\n     pass\r\n \r\n \r\n logger = get_logger(__name__, service=\"worker\")\r\n \r\n \r\n @asynccontextmanager\r\n async def _session_scope() -> AsyncSession:\r\n     factory = get_session_factory()\r\n     async with factory() as session:\r\n         async with session.begin():\r\n             yield session\r\n \r\n \r\n async def _check_canceled(job_id: str) -> None:\r\n     factory = get_session_factory()\r\n     async with factory() as session:\r\n         job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n         if job and job.cancel_requested:\r\n             raise JobCanceled(f\"Job {job_id} canceled\")\r\n \r\n \r\nasync def _process_message(msg: BrokerMessage, *, queue: str, consumer_name: str) -> None:\r\n    fields = msg.fields\r\n    job_id = fields.get(\"job_id\")\r\n    if not job_id:\r\n        logger.error(\"Missing job_id in message\", extra={\"stream_id\": msg.entry_id})\r\n        await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n        return\r\n\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n\r\n    # Phase 1: transition QUEUED -> RUNNING and increment attempts\r\n    async with _session_scope() as session:\r\n        job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n        if job is None:\r\n            logger.warning(\"Job not found; acking\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        if job.state in {JobState.SUCCEEDED, JobState.CANCELED, JobState.DEAD}:\r\n            logger.info(\r\n                \"Job already in terminal state; acking\",\r\n                extra={\"job_id\": job_id, \"state\": job.state.value},\r\n            )\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        # Idempotency: if job has already succeeded, do not re-run side effects.\r\n        if job.idempotency_key and job.state == JobState.SUCCEEDED:\r\n            logger.info(\"Idempotent re-delivery; acking\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        # Only process QUEUED jobs here. If state changed unexpectedly, ack.\r\n        if job.state != JobState.QUEUED:\r\n            logger.info(\r\n                \"Job not QUEUED; skipping\",\r\n                extra={\"job_id\": job_id, \"state\": job.state.value},\r\n            )\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        attempt = job.attempts + 1\r\n        job.attempts = attempt\r\n        try:\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.RUNNING, \"Worker starting execution\")\r\n        except InvalidStateTransition:\r\n            logger.exception(\"Invalid state transition to RUNNING\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n    # Phase 2: execute task outside transaction\r\n    job_type = fields.get(\"type\") or (job.type if \"job\" in locals() else \"unknown\")  # type: ignore[name-defined]\r\n    task_def = get_task_definition(job_type)\r\n\r\n    import time\r\n\r\n    start = time.monotonic()\r\n    JOBS_STARTED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type).inc()\r\n\r\n    async def check_canceled() -> None:\r\n        await _check_canceled(job_id)\r\n\r\n    # Reload job state for the context\r\n    factory = get_session_factory()\r\n    async with factory() as exec_session:\r\n        job_for_ctx = await exec_session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n\r\n    ctx_logger = get_logger(f\"miniqueue.task.{task_def.name}\", service=\"worker\")\r\n    ctx = make_context(\r\n        job=job_for_ctx,  # type: ignore[arg-type]\r\n        attempt=attempt,\r\n        session=None,\r\n        logger=ctx_logger,\r\n        check_canceled=check_canceled,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    try:\r\n        payload = task_def.payload_model.model_validate(job_for_ctx.payload)  # type: ignore[arg-type]\r\n        result = await task_def.func(ctx, payload)\r\n        exc: BaseException | None = None\r\n        canceled = False\r\n    except JobCanceled:\r\n        result = None\r\n        exc = None\r\n        canceled = True\r\n    except BaseException as e:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n        result = None\r\n        exc = e\r\n        canceled = False\r\n\r\n    duration = time.monotonic() - start\r\n    JOB_DURATION_SECONDS.labels(type=job_type).observe(duration)\r\n\r\n    # Phase 3: final state transition + result persistence\r\n    async with _session_scope() as session:\r\n        job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n        if job is None:\r\n            logger.error(\"Job disappeared before completion\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        if canceled:\r\n            job.result = None\r\n            job.last_error = \"Canceled\"\r\n            job.cancel_requested = False\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.CANCELED, \"Job canceled cooperatively\")\r\n            JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, state=JobState.CANCELED.value).inc()\r\n        elif exc is None:\r\n            job.result = result  # type: ignore[assignment]\r\n            job.last_error = None\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.SUCCEEDED, \"Job succeeded\")\r\n            JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, state=JobState.SUCCEEDED.value).inc()\r\n        else:\r\n            # Failure path: decide between retry and DEAD\r\n            job.last_error = \"\".join(\r\n                traceback.format_exception_only(type(exc), exc)  # type: ignore[arg-type]\r\n            ).strip()\r\n\r\n            if job.attempts >= job.max_attempts:\r\n                await transition_state(session, job, JobState.DEAD, \"Job reached max attempts\")\r\n                await push_dead_letter(\r\n                    {\r\n                        \"job_id\": job.id,\r\n                        \"type\": job.type,\r\n                        \"queue\": job.queue,\r\n                        \"error\": job.last_error or \"\",\r\n                    }\r\n                )\r\n                JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, state=JobState.DEAD.value).inc()\r\n            else:\r\n                delay = compute_backoff_seconds(\r\n                    job.attempts,\r\n                    base=settings.backoff_base_seconds,\r\n                    multiplier=settings.backoff_multiplier,\r\n                    cap=settings.backoff_cap_seconds,\r\n                )\r\n                job.next_run_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(seconds=delay)\r\n                job.is_enqueued = False\r\n                await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Job scheduled for retry\")\r\n\r\n    # Only XACK after DB commit succeeded.\r\n    await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n \r\n \r\n async def worker_loop(index: int, *, queue: str, consumer_name: str) -> None:\r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     while True:\r\n         messages = await read_jobs(\r\n             queue=queue,\r\n             consumer_name=consumer_name,\r\n             count=1,\r\n             block_ms=5_000,\r\n         )\r\n         if not messages:\r\n             continue\r\n         for msg in messages:\r\n             try:\r\n                 await _process_message(msg, queue=queue, consumer_name=consumer_name)\r\n             except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n                 logger.exception(\"Unhandled error in worker loop\", extra={\"consumer\": consumer_name})\r\n \r\n \r\nasync def reclaim_loop(*, queue: str, consumer_name: str) -> None:\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n    while True:\r\n        await asyncio.sleep(settings.reclaim_interval_sec)\r\n        try:\r\n            messages = await reclaim_stuck(\r\n                queue=queue,\r\n                consumer_name=consumer_name,\r\n                min_idle_ms=settings.visibility_timeout_ms,\r\n            )\r\n            for msg in messages:\r\n                try:\r\n                    await _process_message(msg, queue=queue, consumer_name=consumer_name)\r\n                except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n                    logger.exception(\r\n                        \"Unhandled error processing reclaimed message\",\r\n                        extra={\"consumer\": consumer_name},\r\n                    )\r\n            await update_queue_depth(queue)\r\n        except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n            logger.exception(\"Error in reclaim loop\", extra={\"consumer\": consumer_name})\r\n \r\n \r\n async def main() -> None:\r\n     configure_logging(service=\"worker\")\r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n \r\n     # Start Prometheus metrics server for this process.\r\n     start_http_server(settings.metrics_port)\r\n \r\n     await init_db()\r\n     await ensure_group(settings.queue_default)\r\n \r\n     queue = settings.queue_default\r\n     consumer_name = f\"worker-{id(asyncio.current_task())}\"\r\n \r\n     tasks = [\r\n         asyncio.create_task(worker_loop(i, queue=queue, consumer_name=consumer_name))\r\n         for i in range(settings.worker_concurrency)\r\n     ]\r\n     tasks.append(asyncio.create_task(reclaim_loop(queue=queue, consumer_name=consumer_name)))\r\n \r\n     stop_event = asyncio.Event()\r\n \r\n     loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()\r\n \r\n     for sig in (signal.SIGINT, signal.SIGTERM):\r\n         loop.add_signal_handler(sig, stop_event.set)\r\n \r\n     await stop_event.wait()\r\n     for t in tasks:\r\n         t.cancel()\r\n     await asyncio.gather(*tasks, return_exceptions=True)\r\n \r\n \r\n if __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n     asyncio.run(main())\r\n \r\n"}, "2:LEN": "8a917fb4ded0c661a9ed60fe6bebfd9e944ad9f22365cb42487b92ab48f9c07b", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": " from __future__ import annotations\r\n \r\n import enum\r\n import uuid\r\n from datetime import datetime\r\n from typing import Any, Dict, Optional\r\n \r\nfrom sqlalchemy import JSON, Boolean, DateTime, Enum, ForeignKey, Integer, String, Text, UniqueConstraint\r\n from sqlalchemy.orm import DeclarativeBase, Mapped, mapped_column, relationship\r\n \r\n \r\n class Base(DeclarativeBase):  # type: ignore[misc]\r\n     pass\r\n \r\n \r\n class JobState(str, enum.Enum):\r\n     QUEUED = \"QUEUED\"\r\n     RUNNING = \"RUNNING\"\r\n     SUCCEEDED = \"SUCCEEDED\"\r\n     FAILED = \"FAILED\"\r\n     CANCELED = \"CANCELED\"\r\n     DEAD = \"DEAD\"\r\n \r\n \r\n class Job(Base):\r\n     __tablename__ = \"jobs\"\r\n \r\n     id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\r\n         String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4())\r\n     )\r\n     type: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(64), nullable=False)\r\n     queue: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(64), default=\"default\")\r\n \r\n     payload: Mapped[Dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=False)\r\n \r\n     state: Mapped[JobState] = mapped_column(\r\n         Enum(JobState), default=JobState.QUEUED, nullable=False\r\n     )\r\n \r\n     created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\r\n         DateTime(timezone=True), default=datetime.utcnow, nullable=False\r\n     )\r\n     updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\r\n         DateTime(timezone=True), default=datetime.utcnow, nullable=False\r\n     )\r\n \r\n     idempotency_key: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(128), nullable=True)\r\n \r\n     attempts: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=0, nullable=False)\r\n     max_attempts: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=3, nullable=False)\r\n \r\n     next_run_at: Mapped[Optional[datetime]] = mapped_column(\r\n         DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=True\r\n     )\r\n \r\n     schedule: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(128), nullable=True)\r\n \r\n     last_error: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)\r\n \r\n     result: Mapped[Optional[Dict[str, Any]]] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=True)\r\n \r\n     is_enqueued: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, default=False, nullable=False)\r\n     cancel_requested: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, default=False, nullable=False)\r\n \r\n     events: Mapped[list[\"JobEvent\"]] = relationship(\r\n         back_populates=\"job\", cascade=\"all, delete-orphan\"\r\n     )\r\n \r\n \r\n class JobEvent(Base):\r\n     __tablename__ = \"job_events\"\r\n \r\n     id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)\r\n \r\n     job_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(\r\n         String(36), ForeignKey(\"jobs.id\", ondelete=\"CASCADE\"), nullable=False\r\n     )\r\n \r\n     ts: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\r\n         DateTime(timezone=True), default=datetime.utcnow, nullable=False\r\n     )\r\n \r\n     old_state: Mapped[Optional[JobState]] = mapped_column(Enum(JobState), nullable=True)\r\n     new_state: Mapped[JobState] = mapped_column(Enum(JobState), nullable=False)\r\n \r\n     message: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(255), nullable=False)\r\n \r\n     metadata: Mapped[Dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON, default=dict, nullable=False)\r\n \r\n     job: Mapped[Job] = relationship(back_populates=\"events\")\r\n \r\n \r\n class ScheduleTick(Base):\r\n     __tablename__ = \"schedule_ticks\"\r\n \r\n     id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)\r\n \r\n     schedule_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(128), nullable=False)\r\n     planned_time: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=False)\r\n     enqueued_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(\r\n         DateTime(timezone=True), default=datetime.utcnow, nullable=False\r\n     )\r\n \r\n     __table_args__ = (\r\n         UniqueConstraint(\"schedule_id\", \"planned_time\", name=\"uq_schedule_tick\"),\r\n     )\r\n \r\n"}, "2:LEN": "46ee3f151dc5da83ff230c574cd5f9264ae62b1c54fd2df7926308eca0c05758", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": " from __future__ import annotations\r\n \r\n import logging\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\r\nfrom typing import Any, Awaitable, Callable, Dict, MutableMapping, Optional, Type\r\n \r\n from pydantic import BaseModel\r\n from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n \r\n from ..config import Settings, get_settings\r\n from ..models import Job\r\n \r\n \r\n TaskFunc = Callable[[\"TaskContext\", BaseModel], Awaitable[Any]]\r\n \r\n \r\n @dataclass\r\n class TaskDefinition:\r\n     name: str\r\n     payload_model: Type[BaseModel]\r\n     func: TaskFunc\r\n     max_attempts_default: int\r\n \r\n \r\n @dataclass\r\n class TaskContext:\r\n     job: Job\r\n     attempt: int\r\n    session: Optional[AsyncSession]\r\n     settings: Settings\r\n     logger: logging.Logger\r\n     check_canceled: Callable[[], Awaitable[None]]\r\n \r\n \r\n _TASKS: MutableMapping[str, TaskDefinition] = {}\r\n \r\n \r\n def register_task(\r\n     name: str,\r\n     *,\r\n     payload_model: Type[BaseModel],\r\n     max_attempts_default: int = 3,\r\n ) -> Callable[[TaskFunc], TaskFunc]:\r\n     \"\"\"Decorator to register a task implementation.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     def decorator(func: TaskFunc) -> TaskFunc:\r\n         if name in _TASKS:\r\n             raise ValueError(f\"Task {name!r} already registered\")\r\n         _TASKS[name] = TaskDefinition(\r\n             name=name,\r\n             payload_model=payload_model,\r\n             func=func,\r\n             max_attempts_default=max_attempts_default,\r\n         )\r\n         return func\r\n \r\n     return decorator\r\n \r\n \r\n def get_task_definition(name: str) -> TaskDefinition:\r\n     try:\r\n         return _TASKS[name]\r\n     except KeyError as exc:\r\n         raise KeyError(f\"Unknown task type {name!r}\") from exc\r\n \r\n \r\n def make_context(\r\n     *,\r\n     job: Job,\r\n     attempt: int,\r\n    session: Optional[AsyncSession],\r\n     logger: logging.Logger,\r\n     check_canceled: Callable[[], Awaitable[None]],\r\n ) -> TaskContext:\r\n     return TaskContext(\r\n         job=job,\r\n         attempt=attempt,\r\n         session=session,\r\n         settings=get_settings(),\r\n         logger=logger,\r\n         check_canceled=check_canceled,\r\n     )\r\n \r\n"}, "2:LEN": "abfb6debdb29f8ce5a091fe21d2234bc2376f780abf28502e757aa086b2bad21", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": " from __future__ import annotations\r\n \r\n import asyncio\r\n import signal\r\n from dataclasses import dataclass\r\n from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone\r\n from pathlib import Path\r\n from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional\r\n \r\n import yaml\r\n from prometheus_client import start_http_server\r\n from sqlalchemy import and_, select\r\n from sqlalchemy.exc import IntegrityError\r\n from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n \r\n from .broker import enqueue_job, update_queue_depth\r\n from .config import get_settings\r\n from .db import get_session_factory, init_db\r\n from .logging import configure_logging, get_logger\r\n from .metrics import SCHEDULER_ENQUEUES_TOTAL\r\n from .models import Job, JobState, ScheduleTick\r\n from .state_machine import transition_state\r\n \r\n \r\n logger = get_logger(__name__, service=\"scheduler\")\r\n \r\n \r\n @dataclass\r\n class RecurringSchedule:\r\n     id: str\r\n     job_type: str\r\n     queue: str\r\n     interval_seconds: int\r\n     max_attempts: int\r\n     payload: Dict[str, Any]\r\n \r\n \r\n def load_schedules(path: Path) -> List[RecurringSchedule]:\r\n     if not path.exists():\r\n         return []\r\n     raw = yaml.safe_load(path.read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")) or {}\r\n     out: List[RecurringSchedule] = []\r\n     for item in raw.get(\"schedules\", []):\r\n         out.append(\r\n             RecurringSchedule(\r\n                 id=str(item[\"id\"]),\r\n                 job_type=str(item[\"job_type\"]),\r\n                 queue=str(item.get(\"queue\", \"default\")),\r\n                 interval_seconds=int(item.get(\"interval_seconds\", 60)),\r\n                 max_attempts=int(item.get(\"max_attempts\", 3)),\r\n                 payload=dict(item.get(\"payload\", {})),\r\n             )\r\n         )\r\n     return out\r\n \r\n \r\n async def _enqueue_due_jobs(session: AsyncSession, now: datetime) -> None:\r\n     \"\"\"Enqueue delayed/retry jobs whose next_run_at is due.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     stmt = (\r\n         select(Job)\r\n         .where(\r\n             and_(\r\n                 Job.state == JobState.QUEUED,\r\n                 Job.is_enqueued.is_(False),\r\n                 Job.next_run_at.is_not(None),\r\n                 Job.next_run_at <= now,\r\n             )\r\n         )\r\n         .with_for_update(skip_locked=True)\r\n     )\r\n     result = await session.execute(stmt)\r\n     jobs: List[Job] = list(result.scalars())\r\n     for job in jobs:\r\n         await enqueue_job(\r\n             job_id=job.id,\r\n             job_type=job.type,\r\n             queue=job.queue,\r\n             idempotency_key=job.idempotency_key,\r\n         )\r\n         job.is_enqueued = True\r\n         job.next_run_at = None\r\n         await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Scheduler enqueued delayed job\")\r\n         SCHEDULER_ENQUEUES_TOTAL.labels(schedule_id=\"delayed\").inc()\r\n \r\n \r\n async def _enqueue_recurring(\r\n     session: AsyncSession,\r\n     schedules: List[RecurringSchedule],\r\n     now: datetime,\r\n ) -> None:\r\n     \"\"\"Enqueue recurring jobs based on config file schedules.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     for sched in schedules:\r\n         # Compute the current tick's planned_time by flooring now to interval.\r\n         seconds = int(now.timestamp())\r\n         tick_start = seconds - (seconds % sched.interval_seconds)\r\n         planned = datetime.fromtimestamp(tick_start, tz=timezone.utc)\r\n \r\n         # Check if this tick already exists.\r\n         stmt = select(ScheduleTick).where(\r\n             and_(\r\n                 ScheduleTick.schedule_id == sched.id,\r\n                 ScheduleTick.planned_time == planned,\r\n             )\r\n         )\r\n         exists = (await session.execute(stmt)).scalar_one_or_none()\r\n         if exists:\r\n             continue\r\n \r\n         tick = ScheduleTick(schedule_id=sched.id, planned_time=planned)\r\n         session.add(tick)\r\n         await session.flush()\r\n \r\n         # Create a new job row for this schedule.\r\n         job = Job(\r\n             type=sched.job_type,\r\n             queue=sched.queue,\r\n             payload=sched.payload,\r\n             max_attempts=sched.max_attempts,\r\n             state=JobState.QUEUED,\r\n             is_enqueued=False,\r\n             next_run_at=now,\r\n             schedule=sched.id,\r\n             idempotency_key=f\"{sched.id}:{planned.isoformat()}\",\r\n         )\r\n         session.add(job)\r\n         await session.flush()\r\n \r\n         await enqueue_job(\r\n             job_id=job.id,\r\n             job_type=job.type,\r\n             queue=job.queue,\r\n             idempotency_key=job.idempotency_key,\r\n         )\r\n         job.is_enqueued = True\r\n         await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Scheduler enqueued recurring job\")\r\n         SCHEDULER_ENQUEUES_TOTAL.labels(schedule_id=sched.id).inc()\r\n \r\n \r\n async def scheduler_loop(schedules: List[RecurringSchedule]) -> None:\r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     factory = get_session_factory()\r\n     queue = settings.queue_default\r\n \r\n     while True:\r\n         now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)\r\n         async with factory() as session:\r\n             async with session.begin():\r\n                 await _enqueue_due_jobs(session, now)\r\n                 await _enqueue_recurring(session, schedules, now)\r\n         try:\r\n             await update_queue_depth(queue)\r\n         except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n             logger.exception(\"Failed to update queue depth\")\r\n         await asyncio.sleep(settings.scheduler_interval_sec)\r\n \r\n \r\n async def main() -> None:\r\n     configure_logging(service=\"scheduler\")\r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n \r\n     # Prometheus metrics server for scheduler.\r\n     start_http_server(settings.metrics_port)\r\n \r\n     await init_db()\r\n \r\n     config_path = Path(\"config\") / \"schedules.yml\"\r\n     schedules = load_schedules(config_path)\r\n     logger.info(\"Loaded schedules\", extra={\"count\": len(schedules)})\r\n \r\n     stop_event = asyncio.Event()\r\n \r\n     loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()\r\n     for sig in (signal.SIGINT, signal.SIGTERM):\r\n         loop.add_signal_handler(sig, stop_event.set)\r\n \r\n     task = asyncio.create_task(scheduler_loop(schedules))\r\n \r\n     await stop_event.wait()\r\n     task.cancel()\r\n     await asyncio.gather(task, return_exceptions=True)\r\n \r\n \r\n if __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n     asyncio.run(main())\r\n \r\n"}, "2:LEN": "7432de4d8d99559fecfbff96c8322503a562487ef2cca7951887fc59f5b1e3b7", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}]}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.RepositoryService/FastUpdateFileV2
```
